title: Apples & Carrots +
description: Adds 20 + total new carrots and apples to the game reflecting ores, common resources and other items!
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4660bed5837ae475180e7cd0eca76bdf62453667.png)
_________________________________________________________________________________________

This new mod adds 20 + Apples & Carrots (hence the name dummy) reflecting of Ores and resources in the game!!!!

_(Gold Apple and Carrot were obviously not mine i just added them in there cuz why not)_


![The New Apples And Carrots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49f51fae71b2c89ea1b28bc5d36e5632f5f26e28.png)

________________________________________________________________________________________________


<details>
<summary>Potions🧪</summary>
Here is all the Potions in this mod:

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79e943acaa222e746e2c60d1a380c60ec8ebdb9e.png)
 
This Potion Called "Bounce" will launch You up and you will then fall down slowly!

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/apJEQ6jv/images/ef7aee5d94821804c40e5b765c86651e5ec1bab8.gif)


</details>










<details>
<summary>Apples🍎</summary>

 **Coal Apple** 
   
   A Apple surrounded by coal can get you the Coal Apple!


   This Apple Will Give You the coal effect, this effect gives you 12 pieces of coal along with        smoke particals at your feet!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cd4776424ec88b9818120b2a6e60bba3b63b5aa.png)

**Stone Apple**

 A Apple surrounded by Stone can get you the Stone Apple!


   This Apple Will Give You Speed, Regeneration and Jump Boost for 3 Seconds so will the carrot


   ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c197ce9783afdab9084d0567529eed8bbec973c.png)

  **Iron Apple**

 A Apple surrounded by Iron ingots can get you the Iron Apple!


   This Apple Will Give You Speed, Regeneration, Jump Boost And Strength for 5 Seconds being a Slight upgrade from the Stone Apple

  ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f4229d5b1f08a10d5eaffccafbaf810874422d6.png)


  **Diamond Apple**

 A apple surrounded by Diamonds can get you the Diamond Apple!


   This Apple Will Give You Speed, Regeneration, Jump Boost and luck for 15 Seconds

  ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00d6dc0a7aba90a4a7b381e09623e24c2b4121b7.png)

  **Netherite Apple**

 A Enchanted Golden apple surrounded by Netherite Blocks can get you the Netherite Apple!

 ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84047fa106f1e49b195747115f3bdf390571717c.png)


   This Apple Will give you CRAZY effects:

   ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec55c1fb332a8b45aeb329dff9810c84398043bf.png)

  **Emerald Apple**

 A Apple surrounded by Emeralds can get you the Emerald Apple!

![x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8d6feb89d44d6fd659306a1a11f3cd92a503d14.png)


   This Apple Will give you Hero Of the village and night vision, quite a Combo!

   **Redstone Apple**

 A Apple surrounded by Redstone Blocks can get you the Redstone Apple!

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/494ba1cef0277b6626524ecc425b45d17ef21426.png)

   This Apple Will give you Glowing and night vision, Great for big mining trips with freinds!

   **Slime Apple**

 A Apple surrounded by Slimeballs can get you the Slime Apple!
 (aka the best apple)

 ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f2c5d25adf7144714cdf104a2ebc733a1bda37a.png)



   This Apple Will give you The Custom "Bounce" Effect, Check out the potion section for more details!


 **Lapis Apple**

 A Apple surrounded by Lapis can get you the Lapis Apple!


![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffd2daab31c68b55c16e37d12908c4bfba697be8.png)


   This Apple Will give you 20 - 30 Levels of Xp great for enchanting.


![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/apJEQ6jv/images/46b0140b7d7c4dc2519cf26fca454c2b365fa67f.gif)
  


</details>


<details>
<summary>Carrots🥕</summary>

 **Coal Carrot** 
   
   A carrot surrounded by coal can get you the Coal Carrot!


   This Carrot Will Give You the coal effect just like the apple, this effect gives you 12 pieces of coal along with smoke particals at your feet!




   ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef6a68a2e175aa1affea61f8f44c09d0a6026c94.png)
   

 **Stone Carrot**

 A carrot surrounded by Stone can get you the Stone carrot!


   This carrot Will Give You Speed, Regeneration and Jump Boost for 3 Seconds

   ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f638ea3b4b546d8191184f255d418ffd3d5a4fdc.png)

  **Iron Carrot**

 A Carrot surrounded by Iron ingots can get you the Iron carrot!


   This carrot Will Give You Speed, Regeneration, Jump Boost And Strength for 5 Seconds being a Slight upgrade from the Stone Carrot

   ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be1bd0dd0247fc0826d11aee4b5a616fa5c7469e.png)


  **Diamond Carrot**

 A carrot surrounded by Diamonds can get you the Diamond carrot!


   This carrot Will Give You Speed, Regeneration, Jump Boost and luck for 15 Seconds

   ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e358dd1a7932b2eb315a87c1fe5fa5f31284217.png)


   **Netherite Carrot**

 A Golden Carrot surrounded by Netherite Blocks can get you the Netherite Carrot!

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a1911837c269647deabd2a3889fd86c6c30f8fc.png)


   This Carrot Will give you CRAZY effects:

   ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec55c1fb332a8b45aeb329dff9810c84398043bf.png)

   **Emerald Carrot**

 A Carrot surrounded by Emeralds can get you the Emerald Carrot!

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbc9f66a52b79b652a36f34474db75f55662618f.png)


   This Carrot Will give you Hero Of the village and night vision, quite a Combo!

 

   **Redstone Carrot**

 A Carrot surrounded by Redstone Blocks can get you the Redstone Carrot!

![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9099fe2427f5b5a7975c14860406c65f862415c2.png)

   This Carrot Will give you Glowing and night vision, Great for big mining trips with freinds!

   **Slime Carrot**

 A Carrot surrounded by Slimeballs can get you the Slime Carrot!
 (aka the best ONE)

 ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73e9c23eb03e88cd0cf5f98ffe6dc430af780ef6.png)

   This Carrot Will give you The Custom "Bounce" Effect, Check out the Potion section for more details!


**Lapis Carrot**

 A Carrot surrounded by Lapis can get you the Lapis Carrot!


![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05c7010ba43bb4ad5491462af9bce081f490810c.png)

   This Carrot Will give you 20 - 30 Levels of Xp great for enchanting.


![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/apJEQ6jv/images/46b0140b7d7c4dc2519cf26fca454c2b365fa67f.gif)
  

 

  

   

   


</details>


<details>
<summary>Bugs🐞</summary>

 The Bounce effect can sometimes damage you on the first landing if theres a drastic change in hight.



</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits✅</summary>

Thank you to Blockbench Title generator for the title of my mod, its realy helpful go check it out!



</details>
